name: HMS Mammouth (W 56)
events: 9 Jul 1942 HMS H 43 (Lt. A.R. Profit, DSC, RN) departed Sheerness for Portsmouth. She was escorted by the tug Mammouth. (1)
3 Sep 1942 With her refit completed, HMS H 50 (Lt. G.E. Hunt, DSC, RN), departed Sheerness for Portsmouth. She was escorted by the tug Mammouth. (2)
20 Apr 1943 HMS H 32 (Lt. T.G. Ridgeway, RN) departed Sheerness for Portsmouth. She was escorted by the tug Mammouth. (3)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
